channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-22T16:40Z — 1331 outages, 26,359 customers, 872 fair-weather, 10 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 1337 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VAWV-APCO: 1201 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1067 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH: 674 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
